docTitle: Tira Iqedsen s yiwen uzelmaḍ · Seg uxleq ɣer tejmaɛt

share.title: Tira Iqedsen s yiwen uzelmaḍ
share.text: S yiwen uzelmaḍ kan, issin tamacahut tameqqrant n Tira Iqedsen — d ayɣer i d-yusa Yasuɛ.

epochs.title: Axleq
epochs.events: Setta wussan n uxleq, amdan yettwaxleq s ṣṣifa n Yillu, asteɛfu n wass wis sebɛa
epochs.q: Di tazwara Illu yexleq igenwan d lqaɛa.
epochs.christ: Ddunit tettwaxleq-d s « Wawal ». Lexbeṛ n Lxir n Yuḥenna inna-d d akken Awal-agi d Yasuɛ s yiman-is (Yuḥenna 1:1-3).
epochs.detail:
Tira Iqedsen ur d-bdunt ara s usentel afilusufan, meɛna s usefru: « Di tazwara, Yillu… » Ddunit mačči d lḥadeṛ kan, meɛna d lxedma n Yillu yesɛan udem.

  • Ṣṣifa n Yillu · seg lmexluqat meṛṛa, d amdan kan i yettwaxelqen ad icbu Yillu — ad t-issin, ad iḥareb ɣef ddunit.
  • Asteɛfu · asteɛfu n wass wis sebɛa ibeggen-d kullec ikemmel yerna yerked (shalom): « yelha ».
  • Ɛaden · ddunit uqbel ad terreẓ, anda Yillu d umdan leḥḥun ɣer tama.

epochs.title: Tuccḍa
epochs.one: Ikcem-d ddnub, yegzem wassaɣ gar umdan d Yillu.
epochs.events: Učči n yixef yettwagedlen, asuffeɣ seg Ɛaden, tewweḍ-d lmut akked lɛetb
epochs.q: Ad rreɣ taɛdawit gar-ak d tmeṭṭut … Ccetla-s ad ak-temḥeq aqerruy-ik.
epochs.christ: Lemɛahda tamezwarut n Lexbeṛ n Lxir, yettunefken-d kan ɣer-s deffir tuccḍa: « ccetla n tmeṭṭut » ad temḥeq aqerruy n yizerm — d Yasuɛ-agi (Amezruy n talsa 3:15; At Ṛuma 16:20; At Galasya 4:4).
epochs.detail:
S ujgugel n tebɣest ad « yili am Yillu », ikcem-d ddnub ɣer ddunit. Ayen i d-yeḍran mačči d lqanun yerreẓ kan, meɛna d assaɣ yerreẓ.

  • Assaɣen rzan · d Yillu (teffer), gar yemdanen (tiwsi n ddnub ɣef wayeḍ), d tmurt (asennan d lɛetb).
  • Lmut · alɣu « ad temmteḍ s tidett » yuɣal d tidett.
  • Amezruy n talsa 3:15 · meɛna di tlemmast n leḥkem, lemɛahda n usellek tusa-d d tamezwarut. Imusnawen ttsemmin-as protoevangelium (Lexbeṛ n Lxir amezwaru).
epochs.next: Tura Yillu issawal i yiwen wergaz akken ad yebdu usellek…

epochs.title: Lejdud
epochs.one: Yewɛed Yillu Ibṛahim: « Ad tiliḍ d abrid n lbaraka ».
epochs.events: Lemɛahda n Ibṛahim, asebbel n Isḥaq, tnac warraw n Yeɛqub, Yusef yuli ɣer tezmert di Maṣer
epochs.q: Ad ak-rreɣ d lǧens ameqqran … Iderman akk n lqaɛa ad ttubarken yis-k.
epochs.christ: Lemɛahda i d-yennan d akken « iderman meṛṛa ad ttubarken » tettwakemmel di Yasuɛ, ccetla n Ibṛahim (At Galasya 3:16).
epochs.detail:
Yebda Yillu ad ifru ugur n talsa meṛṛa s usiwel i yiwen wergaz, Ibṛahim. Wul n waya d lemɛahda — lǧens ameqqran, tamurt, akked « lbaraka i yiderman meṛṛa ».

  • Liman · Ibṛahim yumen s lemɛahda ur nettwali ara, tettwaḥsab-as d teɣdemt (Amezruy n talsa 15:6).
  • Isḥaq d Yeɛqub · lemɛahda tɛeddi ɣer wid d-iteddun; Yeɛqub (Isṛail) d baba n tnac n leɛṛac.
  • Yusef · yettnuzen sɣuṛ watmaten-is meɛna yuli ɣer tezmert — « yessufeɣ-it Yillu ɣer lxir » (Amezruy n talsa 50:20).
epochs.next: Deffir Yusef, twacult tṣubb ɣer Maṣer — tuɣal d takelwa…

epochs.title: Tuffɣa akked unezruf
epochs.one: Yessellek Yillu agdud yellan d akli, yerra-t d ayla-s.
epochs.events: Ɛecṛa lbeliyat, Tafaska n uɛeddi, azger n Yilel Azeggaɣ, Ɛecṛa Lewṣayat di Sina, aqiḍun n temlilit, 40 iseggasen deg unezruf
epochs.q: Ad kkun-rreɣ d agdud-iw, ad iliɣ d Illu-nwen.
epochs.christ: Tafaska n uɛeddi — anda idammen n yizimer rran lmut ad tɛeddi — twekkel ɣer Yasuɛ, « izimer n Tfaska-nneɣ », yettusemmṛen fell-aɣ (1 At Kurintus 5:7).
epochs.detail:
Asellek ameqqran n Lwaṣiya Taqdimt. Isṛail yellan d akli yettwasellek s tezmert n Yillu, yuɣal d agdud-is.

  • Tafaska n uɛeddi · axxam yettwaɛelmen s yidammen n yizimer iɛedda-it lmut — d lqanun deffir yal asfel.
  • Yilel Azeggaɣ · asellek anda abrid yekfa; « azger » yuɣal d tamatart n tazwara tamaynut.
  • Lemɛahda n Sina · s Lewṣayat lemden amek ad ɛicen d agdud n Yillu.
  • Aqiḍun · amkan iqedsen yeleḥḥun anda Yillu yezdeɣ gar wegdud-is — afwad n « Ɛimmanu-Il ».
  • 40 iseggasen · s ujgugel, llil yebqa yettenɣennu, meɛna Yillu yeqqim ɣer-sen s lmanna d teɣẓazt n usigna d tmes.
epochs.next: Bedden ɣer rrif n tmurt yettwaɛhden, heggan iman-nsen ad kecmen…

epochs.title: Asaweḍ akked Inezzurfa
epochs.one: Ufan tamurt, meɛna mbla agellid yal yiwen ixeddem ayen i s-yehwan.
epochs.people: Yacuɛa; inezzurfa am Gidɛun d Camcun; Raɛut
epochs.events: Tuɣalin n Yiriku, asteɣ di Kenɛan, taneqqist yettɛawaden n ddnub–leḥkem–asellek
epochs.q: Deg tallit-nni ulac agellid deg Isṛail, yal yiwen ixeddem akken i as-yehwa.
epochs.christ: Si ccetla n Raɛut i d-yusa Dawed, si ccetla n Dawed i d-yusa Yasuɛ (Matta 1). Ula di lfawḍa, ttejra n twacult n Lmasiḥ tkemmel.
epochs.detail:
Seddaw Yacuɛa kecmen ɣer tmurt yettwaɛhden, meɛna mi steɣen ar deffir ttun Yillu. Inezzurfa d taneqqist nni i d-yettɛawaden.

  • Taneqqist ɣer wadda · ddnub → lqehr → tiɣṛi → anezruf isellek → ddnub daɣen. Yettcuddu kan.
  • Inezzurfa · Gidɛun, Camcun, Debura — imsellken n kra n lweqt, d iḥeggalen meɛna ččuṛen d lɛyub.
  • Raɛut · tamacahut yefsusen n ṣṣina di lweqt aberkan; tameṭṭut tabeṛṛanit tekcem ɣer ccetla n Dawed (akked Yasuɛ).
epochs.next: Agdud iɣeṛṛeq: « Efk-aɣ-d ula d nekni agellid! »…

epochs.title: Tagelda yedduklen
epochs.one: Yewɛed Yillu Dawed: « Akersi-k ad yili i lebda ».
epochs.events: Agellid amezwaru Caɛul, Dawed akked Gulyat, lemɛahda n Dawed, Sliman ibennu lǧameɛ
epochs.q: Akersi n tgeldit-ik ad ibedd i lebda.
epochs.christ: « Akersi n lebda » yettwakemmel di Yasuɛ, mmi-s n Dawed — daymi i as-qqaren « Mmi-s n Dawed » (Luqa 1:32-33; Matta 1:1).
epochs.detail:
Asawen n Isṛail, seddaw kraḍ igelliden.

  • Caɛul · agellid i issuter wegdud; tazwara yelhan terreẓ s ujgugel.
  • Dawed · « argaz akken yebɣa wul n Yillu ». Iɣleb Gulyat, yerra Urucalim d tamanaɣt. Ixdem ddnub ameqqran (Batcabaɛ) meɛna inneḥcam seg wul (Ahellil 51).
  • Lemɛahda n Dawed (2 Ṣamwil 7) · Yillu yewɛed ad isbedd ssulala n Dawed i lebda — aẓar igejdanen n usirem n Lmasiḥ.
  • Sliman · deg uswir n tmusni d tegellelt ibennu lǧameɛ, meɛna deg taggara n tudert-is yuɣal ɣer leṣnam.
epochs.next: Deffir Sliman, tagelda tebḍa ɣef sin…

epochs.title: Tagelda yebḍan
epochs.one: Tebḍa ɣef ugemmuḍ (Yahuda) d ugafa (Isṛail), agdud yeṣubb ɣer tmegrareḍt.
epochs.people: Igelliden n snat n tgelda; lanbiya am Ilyas, Icaɛya, Irmiya
epochs.events: Tagelda tebḍa, leṣnam yemɣin, lanbiya ttḥuddun
epochs.q: Akkagi i yuɣalen wat Isṛail n ugafa d iɛdawen n tgelda n Dawed ar ass-a.
epochs.christ: Deg lɛasr-agi lanbiya cehhden-d Lmasiḥ ara d-yasen s tefrat ugar (Icaɛya 9:5; Icaɛya 53).
epochs.detail:
Deg wussan n mmi-s n Sliman, agdud yebḍa: tagelda n ugafa n Isṛail (10 leɛṛac, tamanaɣt Samarya) akked tagelda n ugemmuḍ n Yahuda (2 leɛṛac, tamanaɣt Urucalim).

  • Isṛail (agafa) · yal agellid iqeddec i leṣnam; teɣli ɣer Aturya di 722 uqbel ƐM.
  • Yahuda (agemmuḍ) · ssulala n Dawed tkemmel, s kra igelliden yelhan am Ḥizqiyya d Yucciya, meɛna s umata teṣubb.
  • Lanbiya · Ilyas, Ɛamus, Icaɛya, Irmiya ɣeṛṛen « uɣalet-d! » Asirem n Lmasiḥ yewweḍ ɣer wuswir-is ameqqran dagi (« aqeddac iɛettben » n Icaɛya 53).
epochs.next: Di taggara yusa-d leḥkem yettwaḥudden — ttwawin ɣer tmegrareḍt…

epochs.title: Tamegrareḍt
epochs.one: Tagelda teɣli, agdud yettwajbed ɣer tmura tibeṛṛaniyin.
epochs.events: Isṛail iɣli ɣer Aturya (722), Yahuda iɣli ɣer Babil yerna lǧameɛ yettwahudd (586)
epochs.q: Tama n isaffen n Babil, anda i neqqim, nettmekti-d Ṣiyun nettru.
epochs.christ: Deg lqaɛ n lqella n usirem Irmiya yewɛed «tamsisit tamaynut» (Irmiya 31:31) — d lemɛahda i iḥerz Yasuɛ deg imensi aneggaru.
epochs.detail:
Alɣu yuɣal d tidett. Lǧameɛ iṛeɣ, agdud yettwawi ɣer Babil — sruḥen tamurt, agellid, akked lǧameɛ: agnu aneggaru n meṛṛa.

  • Sin tuɣaliwin · Isṛail (Aturya, 722 uqbel ƐM) akked Yahuda (Babil, 586 uqbel ƐM).
  • Danyal · lemtel n liman ula di lqaṣar abeṛṛani (lḥeffra n yizmawen); iwala timeẓriwin n « tgelda n lebda » ara d-yasen.
  • Tafat n usirem · taẓri n yiɣsan iquranen yettidiren (Ḥizqiyal 37) akked « lemɛahda tamaynut » n Irmiya twekklen ɣer uzekka di ṭṭlam.
epochs.next: Sebɛin iseggasen deffir, Yillu yeldi abrid — uɣalen-d ɣer wexxam…

epochs.title: Tuɣalin
epochs.events: Tuɣalin s ulamer n Sirus, abennu n lǧameɛ, asgmi n leswaṛ n Urucalim, tuɣalin n Wawal
epochs.q: Ass-a d ass iqedsen i Ssid-nneɣ.
epochs.christ: Malaxi, taktabt taneggarut n Lwaṣiya Taqdimt, ikemmel s ucili n umceggeɛ ara iheggin abrid n Lmasiḥ: «Aql-i ad d-ceggɛeɣ amazan-inu» (Malaxi 3:1).
epochs.detail:
S ulamer n ugellid Aparsi Sirus (538 uqbel ƐM) tebda tuɣalin. S kraḍ lemwaji uɣalen-d bnan ayen yerẓen.

  • Zerubbabel · ibennu lǧameɛ (yekfa di 516 uqbel ƐM).
  • Ɛezra · isselmad daɣen Awal yerna isseḥya liman.
  • Naḥamya · ibennu leswaṛ n Urucalim di 52 wussan.
  • Astir · isellek Udayen di Faris seg usenger — « ɣef lweqt am wagi ».
  • Asirem yebqan · lǧameɛ ibedd, meɛna ulac agellid am Dawed. Agdud iggani Lmasiḥ.
epochs.next: Imiren… am akken igenni iggugem, ɛeddan 400 iseggasen.

epochs.title: Iseggasen n tsusmi
epochs.one: 400 iseggasen mbla ṣṣut n nnbi — meɛna anrar yettwaheggi s tsusmi.
epochs.events: Faris → Lyunan → tilelli n At Makabi → leḥkem n Ṛuma
epochs.q: Asmi i d-iwweḍ lweqt i aɣ-iwɛed Yillu, iceggeɛ-d Mmi-s i d-ilulen si tmeṭṭut.
epochs.christ: Aheggi-agi n wanrar meṛṛa d lxedma n Yillu i wakken ad d-yas Yasuɛ deg lweqt-is « mi d-iwweḍ lweqt ».
epochs.detail:
Seg Malaxi ɣer Lwaṣiya Tamaynut, ɛeddan azal n 400 iseggasen mbla Tira tamaynut. Meɛna deffir umezruy, Yillu yetthegi abrid n Lexbeṛ n Lxir.

  • Tigeldiwin ttbeddilent · Faris → Lyunan (Skander, 333 uqbel ƐM) → At Batulima d At Salukus → tagrawla n At Makabi (167 uqbel ƐM) → Ṛuma (63 uqbel ƐM).
  • Tagrigit · talsa n Skander terra tagrigit d tutlayt tamatut; Lwaṣiya Taqdimt tettwasuqqel ɣer tegrigit (Septuagint), teldi abrid i Lexbeṛ n Lxir ad immɣur s tɣawla.
  • Iberdan d lehna n Ṛuma · iberdan i ibnan akked « lehna n Ṛuma » uɣalen d iberdan n tebṛaḥt.
  • Lijmuɛat d ikabaren · aselmed di lijmuɛat yeṭṭef aẓar; d-uɣalen At Ifarisiyen d At Ṣadduqiyen; yerna asirem n Lmasiḥ yewweḍ.
epochs.next: Imiren tasusmi terreẓ — di taggara, yusa-d.

epochs.title: Yusa-d Yasuɛ
epochs.events: Tukksa n weksum, tabṛaḥt-is d uselmed-is d lmuɛjizat-is, lmut ɣef umidag, ḥeggu deg wass wis kraḍ
epochs.q: Awal yuɣal d amdan, iɛac gar-aneɣ … iččuṛ d tidett akked ṛṛeḥma.
epochs.christ: Ccetla n tmeṭṭut (anrar 2), lbaraka n Ibṛahim (3), izimer n Tfaska (4), agellid n lebda n Dawed (6), lemɛahda tamaynut (8) — kullec yettwakemmel deg yiwen wemdan, Yasuɛ: nnbi-nneɣ, lmuqeddem-nneɣ, agellid-nneɣ n tidett.
epochs.detail:
Tasusmi terreẓ; yusa-d Win yettwaɛhden. Rebɛa Ilqaḍ cehhden-d ɣef tudert n Yasuɛ, lmut-is, akked ḥeggu-s seg rebɛa tama.

  • Tukksa n weksum · Yillu yuɣal d amdan (Ɛimmanu-Il, « Yillu yid-nneɣ »), deg umkan aḥeqqaṛ n Bitleḥem.
  • Tabṛaḥt · isselmad tagelda n Yillu, isseḥlay imuḍan, issawal i yimednuben. « Win iwalan nekk, iwala Babat. »
  • Amidag · ixelleṣ azal n ddnub d lmut i d-yewwi tuccḍa (anrar 2). Izimer n Tfaska n tidett.
  • Ḥeggu · yeḥya-d deg wass wis kraḍ, yerẓa tazmert n ddnub d lmut d Cciṭan — yakan ɣef umidag « yekkes tazmert i yiduba d tzemmar n ṭṭlam … iɣleb-itent » (At Kulus 2:15).

Daymi Yasuɛ d nnbi-nneɣ n tidett (ibeggen-d abrid ɣer Yillu), d lmuqeddem-nneɣ n tidett (s lǧetta-s yekkes ddnub), d agellid-nneɣ n tidett (iɣleb ddnub d lmut d Cciṭan, iḥkem i lebda).
epochs.next: Yasuɛ yeḥyan iceggeɛ inelmaden-is ɣer ddunit…

epochs.title: Tjemmaɛt tebda-d
epochs.one: Yusa-d Ṛṛuḥ, Lexbeṛ n Lxir yemɣur ɣer ixfawen n ddunit.
epochs.events: Ṛṛuḥ yers-d deg wass n Lɛunṣra, tajmaɛt tlul-d, Lexbeṛ n Lxir yemɣur seg Urucalim ɣer Ṛuma s tqehrit
epochs.q: Ad wen-d-tettunefk tezmert n Ṛṛuḥ imqeddes ara d-irsen fell-awen … ad tawḍem alamma d ixfawen n ddunit.
epochs.christ: Tamacahut-agi mazal-itt teddu. Tira Iqedsen kemmlent s lemɛahda d akken Yasuɛ ad d-yuɣal ad yerr kullec d amaynut (Aweḥḥi 21).
epochs.detail:
Deffir mi yuli Yasuɛ ɣer igenni, Ṛṛuḥ yettwaɛhden yusa-d deg wass n Lɛunṣra, tajmaɛt tlul-d. Lexbeṛ n Lxir yemɣur s tɣawla.

  • Lɛunṣra · Ṛṛuḥ yerra inelmaden yuggaden d inagan iqebbḥen.
  • Buṭrus · ibecceṛ Lexbeṛ n Lxir i Wudayen di Urucalim.
  • Bulus · seg umeqhaṛ ɣer umceggeɛ, izerreɛ tijmuyaɛ deg ddunit n yibeṛṛaniyen yerna yura tibṛatin.
  • Ɣer ixfawen n ddunit · Urucalim → Yahuda → Samarya → Ṛuma. Lemɛahda n « iderman meṛṛa » i Ibṛahim tuɣal d tidett.
  • Akked nekni · tamacahut ur tfukk ara; tetteddu ɣer tuɣalin n Yasuɛ akked igenni amaynut d tmurt tamaynut.
epochs.next: Meɛna tamacahut ur tfukk ara dagi…

epochs.title: Tuɣalin n kullec d amaynut
epochs.one: Yasuɛ ad d-yuɣal, ad yerr kullec d amaynut.
epochs.events: Tuɣalin tis snat, leḥkem aneggaru, taggara n ddnub·lmut·imeṭṭawen, igenni amaynut d tmurt tamaynut
epochs.q: Ad sen-isfeḍ imeṭṭawen, ur tettili lmut, ur yettili leḥzen, ur yettili umeǧǧed ur yettili leqṛiḥ.
epochs.christ: Ɛaden n uxleq amezwaru yettwarra di taggara d « Urucalim amaynut ». Yillu izeddeɣ d wegdud-is i lebda — tummi n Ɛimmanu-Il (Aweḥḥi 21:3; Matta 1:23).
epochs.detail:
Tira Iqedsen ur fukkent ara deg lɛasr n tjemmaɛt. Taktabt-is taneggarut, Aweḥḥi, tessekna-d Yasuɛ yettuɣalen-d ad ikemmel kullec.

  • Tuɣalin tis snat · agellid yettwaɛhden yettuɣal-d s lɛaḍima.
  • Rrbeḥ aneggaru · Cciṭan d lmut ttwaɣelben i lebda, Lmasiḥ iḥkem d agellid n igelliden (1 At Kurintus 15:25-26; Aweḥḥi 20:10).
  • Leḥkem d ḥeggu · yal lbaṭel yettuṣeggem, lmegtin ḥeggun-d.
  • Igenni amaynut d tmurt tamaynut · ddnub, lmut, imeṭṭawen d leqṛiḥ ad ɛeddin i lebda (Aweḥḥi 21:4).
  • Ɛaden yettwarran · deg « Urucalim amaynut » yifen tazwara, Yillu izeddeɣ d wegdud-is i lebda — d agnu i ɣer twekkel Tira Iqedsen meṛṛa.

Daymi tura d lɛasr n « yagi, meɛna mazal »: di Yasuɛ asellek yagi yettwakemmel, meɛna tummi-s mazal nettṛaǧu-tt.
epochs.next: Ihi, d acu i d lmeɛna n tmacahut-agi meṛṛa i « nekk »?

core.title: Ddnub amezwaru — ulac aḥeqqi
core.body: Ugur mačči d « kra n lecɣal yir-ten » meɛna d aẓar n wul. Seg Adem, yal yiwen yettlal seddaw ddnub, ur izmir ad yaweḍ Yillu s yiman-is.
core.vtext: Ulac amdan aḥeqqi, ulac ula d yiwen … Denben meṛṛa, yerna ttwaḥeṛmen si lɛaḍima n Yillu.

core.title: Asaḍuf ur izmir ad iyi-isellek
core.body: Asaḍuf mačči d isiɣ meɛna d lemri. Akken tnaddiḍ ad t-tḍefreḍ, akken i k-d-ibeggen acḥal i tezgalḍ. Iswi-s d akken ad aɣ-yawi ɣer Lmasiḥ.
core.vtext: Asaḍuf ittbeggin-d kan i wemdan d akken d amednub i yella … nettuṛebba-d s usaḍuf armi d asmi d-yusa Lmasiḥ.

core.title: S ṛṛeḥma — d tikci, mačči d aɛeṭṭel
core.body: Asellek mačči d lexlaṣ n lecɣal i texdmeḍ, meɛna d tikci baṭel i win ur t-yuklalen. Daymi ulac win izemren ad izuxx.
core.vtext: S ṛṛeḥma n Yillu kan i tettwasellkem, mi tumnem … Mačči s lḥasanat-nwen … akken yiwen ur ittzuxxu s yiman-is.

core.title: Nuɣal d iḥeqqiyen s liman
core.body: Mačči s ujgugel n usaḍuf, meɛna s liman di Yasuɛ Lmasiḥ i nettuḥsab d iḥeqqiyen — ur nettlusu teɣdemt-nneɣ meɛna ttis.
core.vtext: Imi nuɣal d iḥeqqiyen s liman … amdan ittuɣal d aḥeqqi zdat n Yillu s liman-ines di Yasuɛ Lmasiḥ, mačči imi ixeddem ayen i d-teqqar ṭawrat n Musa.

core.title: Tira Iqedsen twekkelent ɣer Yasuɛ
core.body: Tira Iqedsen mačči d taktabt n yergazen imeqqranen neɣ d adellel n yiman. Seg Amezruy n talsa ɣer Aweḥḥi, yal asebter icehhed-d ɣef yiwen — Yasuɛ Lmasiḥ.
core.vtext: Tiktabin-agi d nutenti i d-icehden fell-i … yessefhem-asen ayen meṛṛa yuran fell-as di Tira.

core.title: Tagelda n Yillu — uzwir n wawal n Yasuɛ
core.body: D asentel i isselmed Yasuɛ ugar. Leḥkem n Yillu d agellid ikcem-d ɣer ddunit-agi yid Yasuɛ yerna ad ikemmel mi ara d-yuɣal. S umidag-is d ḥeggu-s, Yasuɛ d agellid n tidett i iɣelben ddnub d lmut d Cciṭan.
core.vtext: Tagelda n Yillu tqeṛṛeb-d ! Iwweḍ-d lweqt-is ! Uɣalet-d ɣer webrid tamnem s Lexbeṛ n Lxir !

core.title: Lexbeṛ n Lxir — yekmmel kullec
core.body: Azal n ddnub ur zmireɣ ad t-xellṣeɣ, Yasuɛ yexlleṣ-it deg umkan-iw ɣef umidag, yerna s ḥeggu-s iɣleb lmut. Ur tt-rekkdeɣ ɣef « xdem aya » meɛna ɣef « kullec ittwakemmel ».
core.vtext: Kullec ittwakemmel … Lmasiḥ, netta yemmut fell-aɣ mi akken nella d imednuben.

mis.w: « Acuɣer i d-yexleq Yillu amdan izemren ad yednib? Yif lḥal akken ur aɣ-id-ixliq ara? »
mis.t: Yexleq-d Yillu ddunit d wemdan mačči ɣef ddemma n txeṣṣart, meɛna seg tayri yeččuṛen. Ad d-yexleq amdan d amdan i izemren ad yili d assaɣ d Yillu d tayri s yiman-is. Yerna ula d tukksa n ddnub ur teffiɣ ara seg uɣawas n usellek n Yillu (At Ifasus 1:4-5). Anrar amezwaru n Tira Iqedsen mačči d leḥkem meɛna d tayri.

mis.w: « Yettwasuffeɣ yerna yettunefk-as lmut ɣef yiwen yixef kan — Yillu ur yeqseḥ ara aṭas? »
mis.t: Asuffeɣ seg Ɛaden d leḥkem yerna d ṛṛeḥma. A yili yečča seg ttejra n tudert yerna iɛac i lebda deg liḥala-nni terreẓ, yebḍa ɣef Yillu, ad yeqqim yeṭṭef di lqehr i lebda (Amezruy n talsa 3:22). Asurref n lmut yeldi abrid n tuɣalin, yerna ɣer-s kan Yillu yewɛed Amsellek (Amezruy n talsa 3:15). Tayri tella yakan deg leḥkem.

mis.w: « Ibṛahim yettwafren imi yesɛa liman ameqqran — mačči d akken imdanen n Tira Iqedsen meṛṛa d iḥeggalen iɣerfanen? »
mis.t: Ibṛahim iskaddeb yerna icukk; Yeɛqub d aɣeddaɛ. Yillu ur d-issawel ara i yemdanen « yuklalen » meɛna i wid ččuṛen d lɛyub, s ṛṛeḥma. Sebba mačči d lxir-nsen meɛna d tayri n Yillu yeṭṭfen di lemɛahda (Asmekti 7:7-8).

mis.w: « Mačči d asaḍuf (Lewṣayat) d aqeyyed ilaq ad t-tɛeddiḍ akken ad tettwasellkeḍ? »
mis.t: Yillu isellek-iten uqbel ad asen-yefk asaḍuf. Ula d Ɛecṛa Lewṣayat ldint s usefru n usellek: « D nekk i d Ameɣlal Illu-yik, i ak-id-issufɣen seg tmurt n Maṣer » (Tuffɣa 20:2). Asaḍuf mačči « ḍfer-it akken ad tettwasellkeḍ », meɛna d anila n tayri ɣef wamek ara iɛic wegdud yettwasellken yakan (Asmekti 7:7-9). Ṛṛeḥma tezwar daymen; ttaɛa d tiririt.

mis.w: « Asaweḍ n Kenɛan d timegert mbla ṛṛeḥma — ihi Yillu n Lwaṣiya Taqdimt d aqesḥan s tidett. »
mis.t: D asentel iweɛren ur izmir ad ifru deg yiwet n tefyirt. Meɛna Tira Iqedsen ur t-id-ssekanent ara d takriṭ kan, meɛna d leḥkem deffir leqrun n ṣṣbeṛ ɣef cceṛ ameqqran (akked usebbel n warrac) (Amezruy n talsa 15:16; Asmekti 9:4-5; At Lawi 18:24-25). Yillu ur yettɣawal ara ula di leḥkem, yerna iqebbel s lfeṛḥ wid yuɣalen-d ɣer-s — ula d ibeṛṛaniyen am Raḥab d Raɛut (Yacuɛa 6:25; Raɛut 4:13-17).

mis.w: « Dawed d aḥeggal mbla lɛib — daymi i as-qqaren “argaz akken yebɣa wul n Yillu”. »
mis.t: Dawed ixdem azzenni ula d timegert. « Argaz akken yebɣa wul n Yillu » mačči d win mbla lɛib, meɛna win ur neffer ara ddnub-is — yenneḥcam s lekmal yerna yettuɣal-d daymen ɣer Yillu (Ahellil 51). Tayri n Yillu ur tkeddeb ara ula d win yeɣlin s tidett.

mis.w: « Nnbi d win i d-ittxebbiren ɣef wuzekka / Yillu n Lwaṣiya Taqdimt d urrif kan. »
mis.t: Wul n nnbi mačči d « axebbeṛ ɣef wuzekka » meɛna d tiɣṛi tameɛzuzt n Yillu: « Uɣal-d, di leɛnaya-k. » Ula d alɣu n leḥkem ur ibɣi ara ad isnegr meɛna ad d-yerr imdanen yerna ad ten-isellek — « ur bɣiɣ ad yemmet wemcum » (Ḥizqiyal 33:11).

mis.w: « Tamegrareḍt tbeggen-d d akken Yillu yeǧǧa Isṛail s lekmal. »
mis.t: Tamegrareḍt mačči d tujjit meɛna d aɛeqqeb d uṣeffi ɣer mmi-s ameɛzuz (Iɛibṛaniyen 12:6). Yillu ur iṛuḥ ara; yella d Danyal di lqaɛ n tmegrareḍt yerna yewɛed: « ẓriɣ ixemmimen i sɛiɣ ɣef ddemma-nwen, d ixemmimen n talwit mačči d wid n cceṛ, i wakken ad wen-fkeɣ azekka akked usirem » (Irmiya 29:11).

mis.w: « 400 iseggasen mbla awal, Yillu iṛuḥ neɣ yesteɛfa. »
mis.t: Tasusmi mačči d tunalat. Ur d-yenni kan, meɛna deg lweqt-nni meṛṛa ihegga tigeldiwin, tutlayin, d iberdan i wakken ad iheggi anrar n usellek. Deg lweqt iggugmen ugar, Yillu ixeddem s wadda, s tayri (At Galasya 4:4).

mis.w: « Yasuɛ d yiwen uselmad yelhan kan n lexlaq / amidag d rrbeḥ-nni n cceṛ. »
mis.t: Yasuɛ yenna-d d akken d Yillu s yiman-is (Yuḥenna 8:58), yerna amidag mačči d lḥadeṛ neɣ d aɣelluy meɛna d tayri yettwaheggan. Ur t-jebden ara s lɛnef; isebbel tudert-is s lebɣi-s (Yuḥenna 10:18). « Ulac tayri yugaren tin n win ara isebblen tudert-is ɣef yeḥbiben-is » (Yuḥenna 15:13).

mis.w: « Tajmaɛt d tarbaɛt n yemdanen ikemlen, neɣ d lebni kan. »
mis.t: Tajmaɛt mačči d tirni n « iseddiqen ikemlen » meɛna n imednuben yettwasemḥen. Ula d amceggeɛ Bulus issemma iman-is « amednub ameqqran » (1 Timuti 1:16). Tajmaɛt tamenzut ula d nettat tennuɣ yerna teɣli (Lecɣal n Imceggɛen 6:1; 1 At Kurintus 1:11). Mačči d amkan n uzuxx, meɛna d imdanen i d-yettsuruɛen tayri i d-rebḥen (Yuḥenna 13:34-35).

love: Tamacahut ur tebdi ara s leḥkem, meɛna s axleq i d-yusan seg tayri yeččuṛen.
Akken kan yednub wemdan, Yillu yewɛed asellek dinna kan, deg umkan-nni.
Yusa-d Yillu d amezwaru ɣer wergaz ur t-yuklalen, issawel-as s yisem-is, yerra-t d abrid n lbaraka.
Yesla i tneɛlumt n wegdud yellan d akli yerna iṣubb-ed s yiman-is akken ad t-isellek.
Ɣas ttɣaḍeren-t yal tikkelt, mkul tikkelt i ɣeṛṛen iceggeɛ-asen-d amsellek yerna issekker-iten-id.
Ula d Dawed yeɣlin ur t-iḍeggeɛ ara; yis yewɛed agellid n lebda.
I wegdud i s-iwwten azagur iceggeɛ-asen-d lanbiya, yetḥellil: « Uɣalet-d, di leɛnaya-nwen. »
Ula ɣer tmurt taberkant n tmegrareḍt iṣubb-ed yid-sen yerna yewɛed tuɣalin.
Ula i wegdud i iɣellṭen yal tikkelt ur d-yerri ara lemɛahda-s.
Ula deg 400 iseggasen n tsusmi, s tuffra, ihegga abrid n usellek.
Mi akken mazal nella d imednuben, iceggeɛ-d Mmi-s akken ad isebbel tudert-is.
Tayri i d-nerbeḥ, tura yetcceggiɛ-itt ad d-tneɣreɣ ɣef ddunit meṛṛa.
Di taggara ad isfeḍ yal imeṭṭi yerna ad yerr kullec d amaynut s tayri.

s.ui.footer: Tira Iqedsen s yiwen uzelmaḍ · Tira Iqedsen seg Bible Kabyle
s.hero.title:
Tira Iqedsen,
s yiwen uzelmaḍ
s.hero.sub: S yiwen uzelmaḍ kan, issin tamacahut tameqqrant n Tira Iqedsen — d ayɣer i d-yusa Yasuɛ.
s.thread.eyebrow: Yiwet n tefyirt i icudden Tira Iqedsen meṛṛa
s.thread.h2: Di taggara, Tira Iqedsen d yiwet n tmacahut kan
s.thread.note: Yillu yetɛahad (lemɛahda), agdud iṛeǧǧu aṭas n lweqt, di taggara kullec yettwakemmel di Yasuɛ. Ḍfer 13 wanraren id-iteddun deg ubrid-agi — sit ɣef « Ɣer ugar » deg yal takarḍa i tmacahut tɣezfen.
s.gospel.eyebrow: D acu i d lmeɛna n tmacahut-agi i « nekk »
s.gospel.h2: Wul n Tira Iqedsen n tidett
s.gospel.lead: Tira Iqedsen mačči d adellel n lexlaq i d-yeqqaren « ili-k d amdan yelhan ».
s.gospel.sublead: D tamacahut n wamek Yillu, s ṛṛeḥma kan, isellek imednuben ur nezmir ad sellken iman-nsen. Di tlemmast-is yebedd Yasuɛ Lmasiḥ.
s.gospel.mirror:
Taneqqist ur nfennu n Isṛail d tugna n « nekk »

Leṣnam→Lqehr→Tiɣṛi→Yillu isellek→Leṣnam daɣen…

Seg Inezzurfa ɣer tmegrareḍt, Isṛail yettɛawad taneqqist-agi mbla taggara. Tira Iqedsen ur tt-uriɣ ara akken ad neḍsa fell-asen « acḥal i meskinit ».

D lemri. Lmeɛna mačči « Isṛail ixdem aya » meɛna « nekk ula d nekk akkenni i xeddmeɣ » (1 At Kurintus 10:11).

Aṣnam mačči d lmeṣnuɛ kan. D kra ara nḥemmel neɣ ara nettkel fell-as ugar n Yillu — idrimen, rrbeḥ, lqima, imdanen, ula d nekk s yiman-iw. Yerna aseqdec n Yillu d allal akken ad d-awḍeɣ ayen bɣiɣ d leṣnam daɣen.

Di taggara, aṣnam aɣezfan akk d « nekk s yiman-iw, qqimeɣ ɣef ukersi n Yillu ».
s.gospel.coreIntro: Ihi, amek i isellek Yillu amednub am wagi? Atan wul n Lexbeṛ n Lxir i tbecceṛ Tira Iqedsen.
s.gospel.crux:
Tira Iqedsen meṛṛa twekkelent ɣer yiwen umkan.

Imdanen ur zmiren ad rẓen taneqqist n ddnub s yiman-nsen, yerna ulac aḥeqqi. Daymi yelaq win ara ixellṣen azal deg umkan-nsen.

Yasuɛ ur d-yusi ara kan akken ad d-yefk aselmed yelhan. Imi ulac abrid niḍen akken ad iyi-isellek, ilaq-as ad d-yas.

Win ilaqen ad yili ɣef umidag-nni d nekk.
Yasuɛ yewwi ddnub-iw yerna yettusemmeṛ dinna deg umkan-iw.

« Meɛna yettwajreḥ ɣef ddemma n ddnubat-nneɣ, yettwaqehheṛ ɣef ddemma n yizgalen-nneɣ … s lejruḥ-is i neḥla. » — Icaɛya 53:5
s.faq.q1: ▸ Ihi anaɣmas yumnen ad iṛuḥ ɣer igenni, ma d win iɛacen yelha i lebda meɛna ur yumin ara ad iṛuḥ ɣer ǧahennama?
s.faq.a1:
D asteqsi yeṣḥan. Meɛna lefhama snat i deg-s yeffren.

① Tira Iqedsen ur bḍunt ara imdanen ɣef « yelhan d yir-it ». Lqima mačči « yif win i s-d-yezgan » meɛna « ṣṣfawa tamqdest n Yillu ». Zdat-is, ulac win yelhan « aṭas » (At Ṛuma 3:23). Ihi mačči d « amdan yelhan d unaɣmas », meɛna am sin yemdanen sɛan yiwen waṭṭan iqettalen — yiwen yeṭṭef ddwa, wayeḍ yagi-t, yeqqar: « nekk ṣṣeḥḥa-w tif tin n win-ihin ».

② Yiwet n tɣawsa kan i ibeṭṭun igenni d ǧahennama. Mačči d lḥasab n lecɣal, meɛna ma teqbleḍ Yasuɛ Lmasiḥ d Ssid yerna ugur n ddnub-ik yefra. Win ddnub-is yefra s yidammen n Lmasiḥ ad iṛuḥ ɣer igenni; win ur t-neqbil ara, ddnub-is yeqqim, ur iṛuḥ ara. Ulac lxir ara ifrun ugur-agi n ddnub s yiman-is.

Ihi igenni d ǧahennama mačči d « arraz n lecɣal yelhan » meɛna d taluft n assaɣ d Lmasiḥ. Yerna « liman » mačči d aqbal n leɛqel, meɛna d abeddel n win iḥekkmen di tudert — win i t-iqeblen s tidett ur yettzuxxu ara meɛna inneḥcam ugar. Deg tidett, teɣdemt n yiman (« nekk d amdan yelhan ») d aṣnam akk yeweɛren ad yerreẓ, win i d-ittarran nettxemmim « ur neḥwaǧ ara Lmasiḥ » (Luqa 18:9-14).

Tira Iqedsen qqarent-d s tefrat: « Win yumnen s yis ur ittuḥasab ara, ma d win ur numin ara atan ittuḥaseb yakan » (Yuḥenna 3:18). Leḥkem mačči d « lḥasab n tudert-ik deffir lmut » meɛna yefra yakan ɣef ma teqbleḍ Lmasiḥ.

At Ṛuma 3:23 · Yuḥenna 3:18 · At Ifasus 2:8-9 · Luqa 18:9-14
s.faq.q2: ▸ Ur zmireɣ ara kan ad iɛiceɣ tudert yelhan mbla ma umneɣ s Yasuɛ?
s.faq.a2:
D axemmem yettwassnen aṭas, meɛna ur ifhim ara d acu i d ugur n tidett. Atan yiwen lemtel.

Ḥaseb iman-ik tellaḍ deg lbabuṛ n yaḥṛamiyen n yilel. Ɣas ad tezzizdgeḍ akarni, ad tiliḍ d win yelhan d wid yellan yid-k, ad tɛiceḍ tudert d lemtel — mazal-ik d aḥeṛmi, axaṭer lbabuṛ yettawi-k yid-s ɣer wanda iteddu (lmeṛsa n leḥkem). Ugur mačči d « lḥasab n lecɣal » meɛna « anwa lbabuṛ i tcelleḍ » (timagit-ik).

Daymi Lexbeṛ n Lxir ur d-iqqar ara « ɛeṭṭel akken ad tiliḍ d win yelhan », meɛna « beddel lbabuṛ ». Ṣubb seg lbabuṛ n ddnub, zger ɣer Yasuɛ — ɣer timagit tamaynut n mmi-s n Yillu. Mačči d asali n lḥasab s laɛeṭṭa, meɛna d lettkal ɣef Win i k-d-yeṭṭfen afus akken ad tzegreḍ ɣer lbabuṛ-is.

Deg tidett Tira Iqedsen ssekanent-d asellek akken yella d azger-agi — « Ikkes-aɣ-d si tezmert n ṭṭlam, i wakken ad aɣ-issiweḍ ɣer tgelda n Mmi-s ɛzizen » (At Kulus 1:13).

Ur fehhem ara s tuccḍa: mačči d akken tudert yelhan ulac deg-s lmeɛna. Lxir mačči d « aqeyyed » n usellek meɛna d lfakya-s. Win ibeddlen lbabuṛ tura iɛic yelha mačči seg tugdi, meɛna seg tayri n mmi-s.

At Kulus 1:13 · Yuḥenna 1:12 · Yuḥenna 3:3 · At Ifasus 2:8-9
s.faq.q3: ▸ Ma yella win ixedmen cceṛ yufa talwit, yeqqar « Yillu isemḥ-iyi », ma d win iɣaḍen mazal-it yettɛeddi — mačči d ṛṛeḥma rxisen aṭas?
s.faq.a3:
Asteqsi yeṣḥa, yerna lqeṛḥ d tidett. Meɛna awal-agi mačči d « ṛṛeḥma n Tira Iqedsen » meɛna d tabuḥerfit-is.

① Ṛṛeḥma n Yillu werǧin terxis. Ddnub ur yettwaffer ara am akken ur d-yeḍri ara; Yillu s yiman-is ixellṣ azal-is s tudert n Mmi-s. Amidag mačči d tabeggna d akken ddnub d arfsus, meɛna d akken ddnub d aẓayan akk — d ṛṛeḥma akk yeɣlan di ddunit.

② Anneḥcam n tidett yettak-d lfakya. Ma yella win ixedmen cceṛ yufa-d iman-is zdat win iɣaḍen — « Yillu isemḥ-iyi, aql-i di talwit » — mačči d anneḥcam meɛna d aḥakki-s (Matta 3:8). Yerna ṛṛeḥma gar wemdan d Yillu ur tekkes ara lǧerḥ n win iɣaḍen ur t-tḥettim ara ad isemḥ.

③ Ddnub werǧin yettwaǧǧa kan. Yal ddnub yettxellaṣ deg yiwen seg sin imukan — neɣ Lmasiḥ yewwi-t ɣef umidag (i win yumnen ulac leḥkem niḍen, At Ṛuma 8:1), neɣ win i t-yugin ar taggara ad t-yawi s yiman-is. Ihi ulac « lemsamaḥa rxisen ». Win ixedmen cceṛ yeṭṭef daɣen lmesˀulit zdat lqanun n ddunit-agi (At Ṛuma 13:1-4).

④ Imeṭṭawen n win iɣaḍen werǧin meẓẓiyit ɣer Yillu. Yillu yettru d wid yettrun, yettmekti yal imeṭṭi, yerna di taggara ad ten-isfeḍ s yiman-is (Aweḥḥi 21:4). Daymi win iɣaḍen ur yeṭṭif ara aẓayen n ttaṛ weḥd-s, meɛna izmer ad t-yeǧǧ i Yillu aḥeqqi (At Ṛuma 12:19 — « D nekk ara yerren ttaṛ, ara yerren i yal yiwen ayen yuklal, i d-yenna Umeɣlal »).

Matta 3:8 · At Ṛuma 8:1 · At Ṛuma 13:1-4 · Aweḥḥi 21:4
s.respond.sub: Tayri-agi mačči d talɣut meɛna d tinawelt. Ma yella tayri i yettusemmṛen deg umkan-ik tennul ul-ik, ẓẓall taẓallit-agi s leɛqel, tafyirt s tefyirt.
s.respond.prayer:
A Yillu,

Qebbleɣ d akken nekk d amednub ur izmiren ad isellek iman-is.

Umneɣ d akken Yasuɛ yemmut ɣef umidag fell-i yerna yeḥya-d.

Semmeḥ-iyi ddnubat-iw meṛṛa, sya d asawen ili-k d Ssid n tudert-iw.

Qbel-iyi d mmi-k, eǧǧ-iyi ad ɛiceɣ tudert tamaynut.

S yisem n Yasuɛ i ẓẓalleɣ. Amin.
s.respond.after: Ma yella tẓallaḍ taẓallit-agi seg wul, Tira Iqedsen qqarent-d d akken tuɣaleḍ d mmi-s n Yillu. Ur teqqimeḍ ara weḥd-k — nadi tajmaɛt iqeṛben yerna leḥḥu abrid n liman akken.
s.respond.read: Ɣer Adlis iqedsen s yiman-ik — bdu seg Yuḥenna
s.respond.verse: « Ma d wid i tt-iqeblen yumnen yis, widak tɛuzz-iten, uɣalen d arraw n Yillu. » — Yuḥenna 1:12 · At Ṛuma 10:9-10
s.closing.main:
Yiwen Yillu,
s yiwet n tmacahut,
iteddu-d deffir-nneɣ s tayri
ur nfennu.
s.closing.verse: « Ulac ayen i izemren ad aɣ-ifṛeq ɣef leḥmala n Yillu, di Yasuɛ Lmasiḥ Ssid-nneɣ : Ama d lmut neɣ d tudert … neɣ ayen akk yellan di txelqit. » — At Ṛuma 8:38-39
s.closing.small:
Ɣef tmacahut-agi, asaḍuf, isefra, lanbiya, akked tibṛatin rennun-d « aksum ».
Tura, taktabt i ara teldiḍ, ad twaliḍ anda telliḍ di tmacahut.
s.about.line: Yebna ɣef tmuɣli n umezruy n usellek i bḍan tnezbayt n tejmaɛt taprutistant takurit (evangelist · areformist).
